channel.title: Mcp on Kuldeep Singh
channel.description: Recent content in Mcp on Kuldeep Singh

item.title: Claude Code for Agentic AI: From Foundations to Real Agents
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: In a previous hands-on articles, we built agents using local LLMs, and another article hands-on with AI-Integrated Development Environment using Claude Code. This article continues that journey, Here the focus is different: 👉 How Claude Code becomes an Agent Platform — not just a coding assistant. In this article, we will teach Claude how to work with us. We will progressively build: Skills, Agents, MCP tools, Plugin integrations amd by the end, Claude will act as: an About-Me agent, a Books price agent, and an externally powered MCP agent

item.title: Claude Code for Agentic AI: From Foundations to Real Agents
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: In a previous hands-on articles, we built agents using local LLMs, and another article hands-on with AI-Integrated Development Environment using Claude Code. This article continues that journey, Skills, Cloud.md allowed_tools - Read, Grep, Glob, Bash GOlden rules Keep under 500 character. Evals and extendedign thinkings.. Promt Caching.. user progressive disclosuer. Skills references scripts, - run without loading its content in memory. only output consumes the token references, assests. CLAUDE.md loads into every conversation and is best for always-on project standards.
